'''Ghost Battalion''', also known as '''Special Ops Group''', was an elite [[Imperial Special Operations|special operations]] unit of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. As of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Second Platoon, B Company of the Battalion, under the command of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Brazack]] and containing such [[Imperial commando/Legends|commandos]] as [[Koyo]] and [[Santo (soldier)|Santo]], was assigned to [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]]. It was this unit that was responsible for the death of [[Morgan Katarn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
